title: Survival Rebooted
description:
Survival Rebooted is a modpack intent on improving on the Vanilla survival experience. You can use the modpack on your own SMPs, or simply on single player. 

SR stays true to the Vanilla feel with only minor modifications to the terrain.
body:
Survival Rebooted is intent on delivering a pure Vanilla feeling, while improving to what is already installed. 

This modpack is intentionally lightweight, with no recognisable effect (and sometimes a small boost) on the games performance when tested on a Core i5 with integrated graphics and 4GB of allocated RAM.

With only subtle improvements added to the generation of your world, you will love this Vanilla themed modpack with all of it's quality of life features. To name just a few: Falling Trees, Double Doors, Jade and Journeymap. You can be sure that any features added here will slot into the Vanilla feel, just like Mojang would have intended if they were added.

If your looking for a Better Minecraft lite, or just a subtle refresh to how Minecraft can be enjoyed, you won't be disappointed.

This modpack has been created specifically for an SMP which I am creating, so you can be sure that it is a pack which I would actually use myself.

We hope you enjoy this modpack. Do keep in mind that it is currently in open Beta. New features will be released soon.
